components.task_instruction: You are a precise text classifier. Read the input text and assign it to exactly one of the categories defined below.
components.label::against: Assign 'against' if the text explicitly opposes, criticizes, or rejects the specific issue, policy, or action being discussed. This includes direct negative judgments, calls for restriction or prohibition, or arguments/reasons against the issue. If the stance supports the opposing side of the issue, choose 'against'; do not use 'against' if the stance is ambiguous or unrelated.
components.label::favor: Assign 'favor' only if the text directly endorses, supports, or approves of the specific issue, policy, or action itself—not merely its general values or tangential topics. Statements must present positive arguments, advocacy, or justification for the issue, not simply express related beliefs, ideals, or criticisms of the opposition.
components.boundary_rules: If the text supports or approves of the specific issue, assign 'favor'; if it opposes or criticizes the issue, assign 'against'; if it is neutral, unrelated, or does not express a clear stance toward the issue, assign 'none'. If a statement discusses general values, frustrations, or ideas without a clear position on the main issue, choose 'none'. If the stance is ambiguous or only indirectly referenced, use 'none' unless the position is explicitly indicated.

exemplars.text: Praying for that innocent lady. She's a victim too. I hope the execution will not proceed. #NoToDeathPenalty #SaveMaryJaneVeloso #SemST
exemplars.label: none

exemplars.text: Tip for protesters everywhere: your goal is to change the minds of rational adults, not to scar the minds of little kids. #PGH #SemST
exemplars.label: none

exemplars.text: Watching teen mom and watching Farrah be a bitch makes me believe in abortion that much more. #SemST
exemplars.label: favor
